title: MALACASA White Dinner Plates Set of 6, 7.4" Small Porcelain Side Plates Square Dessert Plates Salad Plates, Microwave & Dishwasher Safe, Series Elisa
features: 【DINNER PLATES SET】 This plate set includes 6 piece 7.4-inch small plates. Ideal for pasta, salad, dessert, sandwiches and steak etc. MALACASA white side plates provides ample space to hold your favorite meals. Square dinner plate is perfect for everyday used, as well as more formal occasions. such as family dinners, dinner parties, or special events.

【MODERN AESTHETIC & CLASSIC ELEGANCE】 Featured with low-profile classic round & square design, the simplicity of white dinner plates exude an elegant and sophisticated aesthetic, allowing for creative mix-and-match possibilities with other tableware and dishes, making them suitable for both casual and formal dining settings

【QUALITY PORCELAIN & ENHANCED DURABILITY】 Unlike traditional ceramic crafts, we use ORC porcelain clay and elevate the firing temperature to 2552°F, this process enhances the scratch and heat resistance of MALACASA porcelain white dinner plates, ensuring longevity for your dining essentials

【DISHWASHER & MICROWAVE SAFE】 These dinner plates are very easy to clean because of the smooth surface. You can wash them with soap and hot water, or simply place them into your dishwasher. They are safe for use in the dishwasher, microwave, and preheated oven up to 464℉

【SMOOTH GLAZE WITH NON-STICK FINISH - EASY TO CLEAN】The dessert plate features GLIDECOAT glaze technology that resists sticking, making it easy to clean. Whether you're serving sauces, soups, or hearty meals, the non-stick surface minimizes food residue and keeps each piece looking pristine over time

【GREAT FOR A GIFT】 MALACASA dinner plates set of 6 is popular with friends of all ages with minimalist design and premium quality. Perfect gift for housewarming, Thanksgiving, Party, Christmas and fun celebrations

【12-MONTH WARRANTY & CUSTOMER SERVICE】 Your purchase is guaranteed by our 12-month warranty against manufacturer defects. Our customer service team is always ready to assist you with any inquiries or concerns you may have. Experience worry-free shopping with us today!

Dishwasher Safe & Easy to Clean Fired in high temperature, ivory white side plate sets are crack resistant and durable for years. Safe in oven, dishwasher and microwave. Glazed gloosy plate set are not sticking, easy to clean, save much your house-working time. Stackable plate set also save much space in kitchen. Are these ELISA series plate set lead and cadmium free? Safe for food? Of course, the porcelain plate sets are lead and cadmium safe, safe for your daily meal. What's the real color of the ELISA plate set? White, or pure white? MALACASA ELISA series plate set are Ivory White, not white or pure white. Does the ELISA plate set stain easily? No, the plates sets are made of porcelian, glossy finished, not stick, easy to clean.
